```{r}
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "stopgain"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "stoploss"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "startloss"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "stopgain+nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "nsSNV+splicing"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "nsSNV+stopgain"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "splicing+nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == "startloss+nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"

somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_drg36_mat == ""] <- "No Mutation"
```

```{r}
dim(somatic_drg36_mat)
```

```{r}
table(somatic_drg36_mat)
```

## Germline DRG36 variants
```{r}
drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat <- t(as.matrix(hypoxia_tier_1_2_genes[,colnames(hypoxia_tier_1_2_genes) %in% drg_genes_36]))
```
```{r}
drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat[drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat == "1"] <- "Mutation"

drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat[drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat == "0"] <- "No Mutation"
```

## Combine
```{r}
drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat[1:4,1:4]
```

```{r}
somatic_drg36_mat[1:4,1:4]
```

Combine somatic and germline variants so we can just plot as one heatmap then check any variant?
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat <- matrix(nrow = length(drg_genes_36), ncol = ncol(somatic_drg36_mat))
rownames(germ_som_drg36_mat) <- drg_genes_36
colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat) <- colnames(somatic_drg36_mat)
```

```{r}
for(i in 1:length(drg_genes_36)){
  
  for(j in 1:ncol(somatic_drg36_mat)){
  somatic_gene <- "NA"
  somatic_sample <- "NA"
  somatic_status <- "NA"
  
  germline_gene <- "NA"
  germline_sample <- "NA"
  germline_status <- "NA"
  
  combined_label <- "NA"
    
    if(drg_genes_36[i] %in% rownames(somatic_drg36_mat)){
      somatic_gene <- drg_genes_36[i]
      if(colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat)[j] %in% colnames(somatic_drg36_mat)){
        somatic_sample <- colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat)[j]
        somatic_status <- somatic_drg36_mat[somatic_gene,somatic_sample]
      }
    }
    if(drg_genes_36[i] %in% rownames(drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat)){
      germline_gene <- drg_genes_36[i]
      if(colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat)[j] %in% colnames(drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat)){
        germline_sample <- colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat)[j]
        germline_status <- drg36_tier_1_2_genes_mat[germline_gene,germline_sample]
      }
    }
    
    # Make class
    ## Not found in either
    if(all(c(somatic_status == "NA", germline_status == "NA"))){
      combined_label <- "NA"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "Mutation", germline_status == "NA"))){## Somatic mutation not found in germline
      combined_label <- "Somatic mutation only"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "NA", germline_status == "Mutation"))){## Germline mutation not found in somatic
      combined_label <- "Germline mutation only"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "Mutation", germline_status == "Mutation"))){## Mutation in both
      combined_label <- "Both"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "No Mutation", germline_status == "No Mutation"))){## Mutation in neither
      combined_label <- "NA"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "Mutation", germline_status == "No Mutation"))){## Somatic mutation not germline
      combined_label <- "Somatic mutation only"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "No Mutation", germline_status == "Mutation"))){## Germline mutation not somatic
      combined_label <- "Germline mutation only"
    }
    
    
    # Add label to new matrix
    germ_som_drg36_mat[i,j] <- combined_label
  }
  
}
```

```{r}
# order driver samples by hypoxia scores
germ_som_drg36_mat <- germ_som_drg36_mat[,rownames(hypoxia_op)[rownames(hypoxia_op) %in% colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat)]]

```

Remove rows that are all NA. (only include rows where sum of is.na is not equal to the number of columns)
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat <- germ_som_drg36_mat[(rowSums((germ_som_drg36_mat == "NA")) != ncol(germ_som_drg36_mat)),]
```

## Heatmap
```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=17}
drg36_mut_heatmap <- Heatmap(germ_som_drg36_mat,
                                        name = "DRG36 Mutations",
                                        top_annotation = ha_row_annotation_top,
                                        show_column_names = FALSE,
                                        column_split = hypoxia_op$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor,
                                        col = germ_som_colours,
                                        cluster_rows = TRUE)
```

```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=17}
draw(drg36_mut_heatmap)
```

## Stats
### Update matrix
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat[germ_som_drg36_mat %in% c("Somatic mutation only","Germline mutation only","Both")] <- "Mutation"
```


### Test for differences in scores
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(germ_som_drg36_mat), 
                                                                    ncol = 5))
colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores) <- c("Gene","n_mutated","n_wt","wilcox_p_val","wilcox_p_adj")
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene <- rownames(germ_som_drg36_mat)

for(i in 1:nrow(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores)){
  gene <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene[i]
  test_gene <- as.data.frame(t(germ_som_drg36_mat)[,gene])
  colnames(test_gene) <-"Test_gene"
  test_gene$sample <- rownames(test_gene)
  
  test_data <- merge(test_gene, hypoxia_signatures_tum_data_single[,c("Buffa_signature_Sum_within","WGS_AssayID")],
                     by.x = "sample", by.y = "WGS_AssayID")
  
  table_data <- as.data.frame(table(test_data$Test_gene))
  if(nrow(table_data) > 1){
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_val[i] <- wilcox.test(subset(test_data, Test_gene == "Mutation")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"],
                                                         subset(test_data, Test_gene == "NA")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"])[[3]]
  
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$n_mutated[i] <- nrow(subset(test_data, Test_gene == "Mutation"))
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$n_wt[i] <- nrow(subset(test_data, Test_gene == "NA"))
  }
  
}

germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_adj <- p.adjust(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_val, method = "BH")
```

```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$Significance <- ifelse(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_adj < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
```

```{r}
rownames(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores) <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene
```

Order data by p-value
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores[order(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_val),]
rownames(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores) <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene
```
```{r}
(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_scores)
```

### Q1 Q4 difference
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(germ_som_drg36_mat), ncol = 8))
colnames(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- c("Gene","n_q4_mutated","n_q1_mutated","n_q4_wt","n_q1_wt","fisher_p_val","fisher_p_adj","odds_ratio")
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Gene <- rownames(germ_som_drg36_mat)

for(i in 1:nrow(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart)){
  gene <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Gene[i]
  test_gene <- as.data.frame(t(germ_som_drg36_mat)[,gene])
  colnames(test_gene) <-"Test_gene"
  test_gene$sample <- rownames(test_gene)
  
  test_data <- merge(test_gene, hypoxia_signatures_tum_data_single[,c("Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor","WGS_AssayID")],
                     by.x = "sample", by.y = "WGS_AssayID")
  test_data <- subset(test_data, Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor %in% c("Q1","Q4"))
  
  table_data <- as.data.frame(table(test_data$Test_gene, test_data$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))
  if(nrow(table_data) > 2){
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_val[i] <- fisher.test(table(test_data$Test_gene, test_data$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))[[1]]
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$odds_ratio[i] <- fisher.test(table(test_data$Test_gene, test_data$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))[[3]]
  
  
  
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q4_mutated[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "Mutation") & (Var2 == "Q4"))[,"Freq"]
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q1_mutated[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "Mutation") & (Var2 == "Q1"))[,"Freq"]
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q4_wt[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "NA") & (Var2 == "Q4"))[,"Freq"]
    germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q1_wt[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "NA") & (Var2 == "Q1"))[,"Freq"]
  }
  
}

germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_adj <- p.adjust(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_val, method = "BH")
```

```{r}
# subset(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart, fisher_p_adj < 0.05)
```

```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Significance <- ifelse(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_adj < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
```

Order data by p-value
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart[order(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_val),]
rownames(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Gene
```
```{r}
(germ_som_drg36_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart)
```

### Check mutation in group vs not
Check if mutation in any associated gene has differences in hypoxia score
```{r}
germ_som_drg36_mat_bin <- germ_som_drg36_mat
germ_som_drg36_mat_bin[germ_som_drg36_mat_bin == "Mutation"] <- as.numeric(1)
germ_som_drg36_mat_bin[germ_som_drg36_mat_bin == "NA"] <- as.numeric(0)
```

```{r}
class(germ_som_drg36_mat_bin) <- "numeric"
```

```{r}
summary_germ_som_drg36 <- as.data.frame(colSums(germ_som_drg36_mat_bin))
colnames(summary_germ_som_drg36) <- c("Muts_in_drg36")
summary_germ_som_drg36$WGS_AssayID <- rownames(summary_germ_som_drg36)
summary_germ_som_drg36$bin_muts_in_drg36 <- ifelse(summary_germ_som_drg36$Muts_in_drg36 == 0, yes = "NA", no = "Mutation")
```

```{r}
summary_germ_som_drg36 <- merge(summary_germ_som_drg36, 
                               hypoxia_signatures_tum_data_single[,c("Buffa_signature_Sum_within","WGS_AssayID",
                                             "Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor","PPCG_Donor_ID")],
                               by = "WGS_AssayID")
```

```{r}
summary_germ_som_drg36_quart <- subset(summary_germ_som_drg36, Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor %in% c("Q1","Q4"))
```

```{r}
fisher.test(table(summary_germ_som_drg36_quart$bin_muts_in_drg36,
                  summary_germ_som_drg36_quart$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))
```
```{r}
table(summary_germ_som_drg36_quart$bin_muts_in_drg36, 
      summary_germ_som_drg36_quart$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor)
```

```{r}
wilcox.test(subset(summary_germ_som_drg36_quart, bin_muts_in_drg36 == "Mutation")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"], 
            subset(summary_germ_som_drg36_quart, bin_muts_in_drg36 == "NA")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"])
```

# Combine somatic and germline DRG128 variants
## Somatic DRG128 variants
```{r}
somatic_drg128_mat <- as.matrix(driver_data[rownames(driver_data) %in% drg_genes_128,])
somatic_drg128_mat = somatic_drg128_mat[, -c(1,2)]
somatic_drg128_mat <- gsub("\\.","", somatic_drg128_mat)
```

```{r}
dim(somatic_drg128_mat)
```

```{r}
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "splicing"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "stopgain"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "stoploss"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "startloss"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "stopgain+nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "nsSNV+splicing"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "nsSNV+stopgain"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "splicing+nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"
somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == "startloss+nsSNV"] <- "Mutation"

somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_drg128_mat == ""] <- "No Mutation"
```

```{r}
dim(somatic_drg128_mat)
```

```{r}
table(somatic_drg128_mat)
```

## Germline drg128 variants
```{r}
drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat <- t(as.matrix(hypoxia_tier_1_2_genes[,colnames(hypoxia_tier_1_2_genes) %in% drg_genes_128]))
```
```{r}
drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat[drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat == "1"] <- "Mutation"

drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat[drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat == "0"] <- "No Mutation"
```

## Combine
```{r}
drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat[1:4,1:4]
```

```{r}
somatic_drg128_mat[1:4,1:4]
```

Combine somatic and germline variants so we can just plot as one heatmap then check any variant?
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat <- matrix(nrow = length(drg_genes_128), ncol = ncol(somatic_drg128_mat))
rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat) <- drg_genes_128
colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat) <- colnames(somatic_drg128_mat)
```

```{r}
for(i in 1:length(drg_genes_128)){
  
  for(j in 1:ncol(somatic_drg128_mat)){
  somatic_gene <- "NA"
  somatic_sample <- "NA"
  somatic_status <- "NA"
  
  germline_gene <- "NA"
  germline_sample <- "NA"
  germline_status <- "NA"
  
  combined_label <- "NA"
    
    if(drg_genes_128[i] %in% rownames(somatic_drg128_mat)){
      somatic_gene <- drg_genes_128[i]
      if(colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat)[j] %in% colnames(somatic_drg128_mat)){
        somatic_sample <- colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat)[j]
        somatic_status <- somatic_drg128_mat[somatic_gene,somatic_sample]
      }
    }
    if(drg_genes_128[i] %in% rownames(drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat)){
      germline_gene <- drg_genes_128[i]
      if(colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat)[j] %in% colnames(drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat)){
        germline_sample <- colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat)[j]
        germline_status <- drg128_tier_1_2_genes_mat[germline_gene,germline_sample]
      }
    }
    
    # Make class
    ## Not found in either
    if(all(c(somatic_status == "NA", germline_status == "NA"))){
      combined_label <- "NA"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "Mutation", germline_status == "NA"))){## Somatic mutation not found in germline
      combined_label <- "Somatic mutation only"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "NA", germline_status == "Mutation"))){## Germline mutation not found in somatic
      combined_label <- "Germline mutation only"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "Mutation", germline_status == "Mutation"))){## Mutation in both
      combined_label <- "Both"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "No Mutation", germline_status == "No Mutation"))){## Mutation in neither
      combined_label <- "NA"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "Mutation", germline_status == "No Mutation"))){## Somatic mutation not germline
      combined_label <- "Somatic mutation only"
    }else if(all(c(somatic_status == "No Mutation", germline_status == "Mutation"))){## Germline mutation not somatic
      combined_label <- "Germline mutation only"
    }
    
    
    # Add label to new matrix
    germ_som_drg128_mat[i,j] <- combined_label
  }
  
}
```

```{r}
# order driver samples by hypoxia scores
germ_som_drg128_mat <- germ_som_drg128_mat[,rownames(hypoxia_op)[rownames(hypoxia_op) %in% colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat)]]

```

Remove rows that are all NA. (only include rows where sum of is.na is not equal to the number of columns)
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat <- germ_som_drg128_mat[(rowSums((germ_som_drg128_mat == "NA")) != ncol(germ_som_drg128_mat)),]
```

## Heatmap
```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=17}
drg128_mut_heatmap <- Heatmap(germ_som_drg128_mat,
                                        name = "DRG128 Mutations",
                                        top_annotation = ha_row_annotation_top,
                                        show_column_names = FALSE,
                                        column_split = hypoxia_op$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor,
                                        col = germ_som_colours,
                                        cluster_rows = TRUE)
```

```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=17}
draw(drg128_mut_heatmap)
```

## Stats
### Update matrix
Save copy of matrix for later plots
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_2 <- germ_som_drg128_mat
```
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat[germ_som_drg128_mat %in% c("Somatic mutation only","Germline mutation only","Both")] <- "Mutation"
```


### Test for differences in scores
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(germ_som_drg128_mat), 
                                                                    ncol = 5))
colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores) <- c("Gene","n_mutated","n_wt","wilcox_p_val","wilcox_p_adj")
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene <- rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat)

for(i in 1:nrow(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores)){
  gene <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene[i]
  test_gene <- as.data.frame(t(germ_som_drg128_mat)[,gene])
  colnames(test_gene) <-"Test_gene"
  test_gene$sample <- rownames(test_gene)
  
  test_data <- merge(test_gene, hypoxia_signatures_tum_data_single[,c("Buffa_signature_Sum_within","WGS_AssayID")],
                     by.x = "sample", by.y = "WGS_AssayID")
  
  table_data <- as.data.frame(table(test_data$Test_gene))
  if(nrow(table_data) > 1){
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_val[i] <- wilcox.test(subset(test_data, Test_gene == "Mutation")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"],
                                                         subset(test_data, Test_gene == "NA")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"])[[3]]
  
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$n_mutated[i] <- nrow(subset(test_data, Test_gene == "Mutation"))
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$n_wt[i] <- nrow(subset(test_data, Test_gene == "NA"))
  }
  
}

germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_adj <- p.adjust(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_val, method = "BH")
```

```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$Significance <- ifelse(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_adj < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
```

```{r}
rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores) <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene
```

Order data by p-value
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores[order(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$wilcox_p_val),]
rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores) <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores$Gene
```
```{r}
(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_scores)
```

### Q1 Q4 difference
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(germ_som_drg128_mat), ncol = 8))
colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- c("Gene","n_q4_mutated","n_q1_mutated","n_q4_wt","n_q1_wt","fisher_p_val","fisher_p_adj","odds_ratio")
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Gene <- rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat)

for(i in 1:nrow(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart)){
  gene <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Gene[i]
  test_gene <- as.data.frame(t(germ_som_drg128_mat)[,gene])
  colnames(test_gene) <-"Test_gene"
  test_gene$sample <- rownames(test_gene)
  
  test_data <- merge(test_gene, hypoxia_signatures_tum_data_single[,c("Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor",
                                                                      "WGS_AssayID")],
                     by.x = "sample", by.y = "WGS_AssayID")
  test_data <- subset(test_data, Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor %in% c("Q1","Q4"))
  
  table_data <- as.data.frame(table(test_data$Test_gene, test_data$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))
  if(nrow(table_data) > 2){
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_val[i] <- fisher.test(table(test_data$Test_gene, test_data$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))[[1]]
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$odds_ratio[i] <- fisher.test(table(test_data$Test_gene, test_data$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))[[3]]
  
  
  
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q4_mutated[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "Mutation") & (Var2 == "Q4"))[,"Freq"]
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q1_mutated[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "Mutation") & (Var2 == "Q1"))[,"Freq"]
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q4_wt[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "NA") & (Var2 == "Q4"))[,"Freq"]
    germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$n_q1_wt[i] <- subset(table_data, (Var1 == "NA") & (Var2 == "Q1"))[,"Freq"]
  }
  
}

germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_adj <- p.adjust(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_val, method = "BH")
```

```{r}
# subset(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart, fisher_p_adj < 0.05)
```

```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Significance <- ifelse(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_adj < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
```

Order data by p-value
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart[order(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$fisher_p_val),]
rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart$Gene
```
```{r}
(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart)
```

### Check mutation in group vs not
Check if mutation in any associated gene has differences in hypoxia score
```{r}
germ_som_drg128_mat_bin <- germ_som_drg128_mat
germ_som_drg128_mat_bin[germ_som_drg128_mat_bin == "Mutation"] <- as.numeric(1)
germ_som_drg128_mat_bin[germ_som_drg128_mat_bin == "NA"] <- as.numeric(0)
```

```{r}
class(germ_som_drg128_mat_bin) <- "numeric"
```

```{r}
summary_germ_som_drg128 <- as.data.frame(colSums(germ_som_drg128_mat_bin))
colnames(summary_germ_som_drg128) <- c("Muts_in_drg128")
summary_germ_som_drg128$WGS_AssayID <- rownames(summary_germ_som_drg128)
summary_germ_som_drg128$bin_muts_in_drg128 <- ifelse(summary_germ_som_drg128$Muts_in_drg128 == 0, yes = "NA", no = "Mutation")
```

```{r}
summary_germ_som_drg128 <- merge(summary_germ_som_drg128, 
                               hypoxia_signatures_tum_data_single[,c("Buffa_signature_Sum_within","WGS_AssayID",
                                             "Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor")],
                               by = "WGS_AssayID")
```

```{r}
summary_germ_som_drg128_quart <- subset(summary_germ_som_drg128, Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor %in% c("Q1","Q4"))
```

```{r}
fisher.test(table(summary_germ_som_drg128_quart$bin_muts_in_drg128,
                  summary_germ_som_drg128_quart$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor))
```
```{r}
table(summary_germ_som_drg128_quart$bin_muts_in_drg128, 
      summary_germ_som_drg128_quart$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor)
```

```{r}
wilcox.test(subset(summary_germ_som_drg128_quart, bin_muts_in_drg128 == "Mutation")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"], 
            subset(summary_germ_som_drg128_quart, bin_muts_in_drg128 == "NA")[,"Buffa_signature_Sum_within"])
```


# Heatmaps with stats
## DRG 128
```{r}
gene_group <- as.data.frame(drg_genes_128)
colnames(gene_group) <- c("Gene")
gene_group$Gene_list_group <- ifelse(gene_group$Gene %in% drg_genes_36, yes = "DRG36 + DRG128", no = "DRG128 Only")
rownames(gene_group) <- gene_group$Gene
```

Colours
```{r}
drg_group_colours <- c("DRG36 + DRG128" = "palegreen4", "DRG128 Only" = "mediumaquamarine")
```

Make a table with relevant stats
```{r}
colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- paste0(colnames(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart),"_g_s_drg128")
colnames(germline_drg128_enrichment_t1_2) <- paste0(colnames(germline_drg128_enrichment_t1_2),"_g_drg128")
# colnames(somatic_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- paste0(colnames(somatic_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart),"_s_drg128")
drg_heatmap_stats <- merge(germ_som_drg128_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart, 
                          germline_drg128_enrichment_t1_2, 
                          by.x = "Gene_g_s_drg128", 
                          by.y = "Gene_g_drg128")
drg_heatmap_stats <- merge(drg_heatmap_stats,
                           germline_drg128_wilcox_t1_2,
                           by.x = "Gene_g_s_drg128",
                           by.y = "Gene")

drg_heatmap_stats$g_s_drg128_significance <- ifelse(drg_heatmap_stats$fisher_p_adj_g_s_drg128 < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
drg_heatmap_stats$g_drg128_significance <- ifelse(drg_heatmap_stats$fisher_p_adj_g_drg128 < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
drg_heatmap_stats$g_drg128_wilcox_significance <- ifelse(drg_heatmap_stats$wilcox_p_adj < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")

rownames(drg_heatmap_stats) <- drg_heatmap_stats$Gene_g_s_drg128
```

```{r}
coefficient_colours_drg128_cont <- colorRamp2(c(min(c(drg128_continuous_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                                  hallmark_hypoxia_continuous_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient), na.rm = TRUE),
                                    0,
                                    max(c(drg128_continuous_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                          hallmark_hypoxia_continuous_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                  c("grey20","white","firebrick"))
coefficient_colours_drg128_quart <- colorRamp2(c(min(c(drg128_quartile_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                                  hallmark_hypoxia_quartile_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient), na.rm = TRUE),
                                    0,
                                    max(c(drg128_quartile_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                          hallmark_hypoxia_quartile_coefficients$Hypoxia_coefficient), na.rm = TRUE)),
                                  c("grey20","white","firebrick"))
```

```{r}
drg128_quartile_coefficients_merged <- merge(drg128_quartile_coefficients,
                                             subset(gene_group, Gene %in% rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat)),
                                             by = "Gene",
                                             all.y = TRUE)
drg128_continuous_coefficients_merged <- merge(drg128_continuous_coefficients,
                                             subset(gene_group, Gene %in% rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat)),
                                             by = "Gene",
                                             all.y = TRUE)
```

```{r}
ha_drg128_significance_annotation <- rowAnnotation("Q1 v Q4 - Germline" = drg_heatmap_stats[,"g_drg128_significance"],
                                                   "Mut v Not - Germline" = drg_heatmap_stats[,"g_drg128_wilcox_significance"],
                                                   "Score Coef - Somatic" = drg128_continuous_coefficients_merged$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                                   "Score Signif - Somatic" = drg128_continuous_coefficients_merged$Significance,
                                                   "Quartile Coef - Somatic" = drg128_quartile_coefficients_merged$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                                   "Quartile Signif - Somatic" = drg128_quartile_coefficients_merged$Significance,
                                                   "DRG Group" = subset(gene_group, Gene %in% rownames(germ_som_drg128_mat))$Gene_list_group,
                                                   col = list("Q1 v Q4 - Germline" = c("Significant" = "firebrick", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                              "Mut v Not - Germline" = c("Significant" = "orangered", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                              "Score Coef - Somatic" = coefficient_colours_drg128_cont,
                                                              "Score Signif - Somatic" = c("Significant" = "goldenrod", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                              "Quartile Coef - Somatic" = coefficient_colours_drg128_quart,
                                                              "Quartile Signif - Somatic" = c("Significant" = "goldenrod", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                              "DRG Group" = drg_group_colours),
                                         annotation_name_rot = 45)
```

```{r}
drg128_mut_heatmap_2 <- Heatmap(germ_som_drg128_mat_2,
                                        name = "DRG128 Mutations",
                                        top_annotation = ha_row_annotation_top,
                                        right_annotation = ha_drg128_significance_annotation,
                                        show_column_names = FALSE,
                                        column_split = hypoxia_op$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor,
                                        col = germ_som_colours,
                                        cluster_rows = TRUE)
```

```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=17}
draw(drg128_mut_heatmap_2)
```


## Hallmark hypoxia
```{r}
hypoxia_heatmap_stats <- as.data.frame(rownames(germ_som_hallmark_hypoxia_mat))
colnames(hypoxia_heatmap_stats) <- c("Gene")

colnames(germ_som_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- paste0(colnames(germ_som_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart),"_g_s_hypoxia")
colnames(germline_hypoxia_enrichment_t1_2) <- paste0(colnames(germline_hypoxia_enrichment_t1_2),"_g_hypoxia")
colnames(somatic_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart) <- paste0(colnames(somatic_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart),"_s_hypoxia")

hypoxia_heatmap_stats <- merge(hypoxia_heatmap_stats, 
                          germ_som_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart, 
                          by.x = "Gene", 
                          by.y = "Gene_g_s_hypoxia", all = TRUE)
hypoxia_heatmap_stats <- merge(hypoxia_heatmap_stats, 
                          germline_hypoxia_enrichment_t1_2, 
                          by.x = "Gene", 
                          by.y = "Gene_g_hypoxia", all = TRUE)
hypoxia_heatmap_stats <- merge(hypoxia_heatmap_stats, 
                          somatic_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_hypoxia_enrichment_quart, 
                          by.x = "Gene", 
                          by.y = "Gene_s_hypoxia", all = TRUE)
hypoxia_heatmap_stats <- merge(hypoxia_heatmap_stats,
                               germline_hypoxia_wilcox_t1_2,
                               by.x = "Gene",
                               by.y = "Gene")

hypoxia_heatmap_stats$g_s_hypoxia_significance <- ifelse(hypoxia_heatmap_stats$fisher_p_adj_g_s_hypoxia < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
hypoxia_heatmap_stats$s_hypoxia_significance <- ifelse(hypoxia_heatmap_stats$fisher_p_adj_s_hypoxia < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
hypoxia_heatmap_stats$g_hypoxia_significance <- ifelse(hypoxia_heatmap_stats$fisher_p_adj_g_hypoxia < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")
hypoxia_heatmap_stats$g_hypoxia_wilcox_significance <- ifelse(hypoxia_heatmap_stats$wilcox_p_adj < 0.05, yes = "Significant", no = "N.S.")

rownames(hypoxia_heatmap_stats) <- hypoxia_heatmap_stats$Gene
hypoxia_heatmap_stats_sub <- subset(hypoxia_heatmap_stats, Gene %in% rownames(germ_som_hallmark_hypoxia_mat))
```

```{r}
hallmark_hypoxia_continuous_coefficients_merged <- merge(hallmark_hypoxia_continuous_coefficients,
                                                         hypoxia_heatmap_stats_sub,
                                                         by = "Gene",
                                                         all.y = TRUE)
hallmark_hypoxia_quartile_coefficients_merged <- merge(hallmark_hypoxia_quartile_coefficients,
                                                         hypoxia_heatmap_stats_sub,
                                                         by = "Gene",
                                                         all.y = TRUE)
```

```{r}
ha_hypoxia_significance_annotation <- rowAnnotation("Q1 v Q4 - Germline" = hypoxia_heatmap_stats_sub[,"g_hypoxia_significance"],
                                                    "Mut v Not - Germline" = hypoxia_heatmap_stats_sub[,"g_hypoxia_wilcox_significance"],
                                                    "Score Coef - Somatic" = hallmark_hypoxia_continuous_coefficients_merged$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                                    "Score Signif - Somatic" = hallmark_hypoxia_continuous_coefficients_merged$Significance,
                                                    "Quartile Coef - Somatic" = hallmark_hypoxia_quartile_coefficients_merged$Hypoxia_coefficient,
                                                    "Quartile Signif - Somatic" = hallmark_hypoxia_quartile_coefficients_merged$Significance,
                                                    col = list("Q1 v Q4 - Germline" = c("Significant" = "firebrick", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                               "Mut v Not - Germline" = c("Significant" = "coral", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                               "Q1 v Q4 Combined" = c("Significant" = "orangered", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                               "Score Coef - Somatic" = coefficient_colours_drg128_cont,
                                                               "Score Signif - Somatic" = c("Significant" = "goldenrod", "N.S." = "grey90"),
                                                               "Quartile Coef - Somatic" = coefficient_colours_drg128_quart,
                                                               "Quartile Signif - Somatic" = c("Significant" = "goldenrod", "N.S." = "grey90")),
                                         annotation_name_rot = 45)
```

```{r}
mut_colours <- c("Mutation" = "forestgreen", "No Mutation" = "grey")
```


```{r}
hallmark_hypoxia_mut_heatmap_2 <- Heatmap(germ_som_hallmark_hypoxia_mat_2,
                                        name = "Hallmark Hypoxia Mutations",
                                        right_annotation = ha_hypoxia_significance_annotation,
                                        show_column_names = FALSE,
                                        column_split = hypoxia_op$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor,
                                        col = germ_som_colours,
                                        cluster_rows = TRUE)
```

```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=17}
draw(hallmark_hypoxia_mut_heatmap_2)
```


```{r}
cumulative_heatmap <- Heatmap(hallmark_hypoxia_muts_t[c("Somatic_mutation","Germline_mutation"),],
                              name = "Any Hallmark Hypoxia Mutation",
                                        top_annotation = ha_row_annotation_top,
                              show_column_names = FALSE,
                              column_split = hypoxia_op$Buffa_signature_Sum_within_quartile_one_sample_per_donor,
                              col = mut_colours,
                              cluster_rows = TRUE)
```

```{r}
draw(cumulative_heatmap)
```

# Combine heatmaps
```{r}
ht_list = cumulative_heatmap %v%  hallmark_hypoxia_mut_heatmap_2
```

```{r fig.height=20, fig.width=16}
draw(ht_list, merge_legend = TRUE, ht_gap = unit(c(3), "mm"))
```

# Session Info
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
